/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/xv6_events_viewer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/xv6_events_viewer.dir/xv6_events_viewer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xv6_events_viewer.dir/main.cpp.o -o xv6_events_viewer  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.1
